entities.name: The Data Asset Narrative
entities.context: Framework for explaining why sourcing partnerships work better than traditional recruiting

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, positioned as a data platform rather than recruiting agency

entities.name: Sourcing Partnerships
entities.context: Business model where partners focus on employer relationships while Careerspan owns candidate data/signal

entities.name: Traditional Recruiting
entities.context: Contrasted approach where agencies try to own both sides of the marketplace

entities.name: Gap Analysis
entities.context: Technique Careerspan uses to understand candidates deeply

entities.name: Signal
entities.context: The deep candidate understanding that Careerspan owns through conversation and analysis

entities.name: Complementary Strengths
entities.context: Principle that aligned, specialized roles avoid muddy incentives

relationships.context: Messaging framework for explaining partnership model to prospects
Careerspan owns the candidate signal, partners own distribution
Contrasted as better alternative - specialized vs. trying to own everything
Partnership model works because of aligned, non-competing incentives
Narrative explains why the partnership model is effective
